name: Potato Green Onion Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the desired temperature.
2. Mix all liquid ingredients (egg, water, oil, lemon juice) in a bowl.
3. Add the dry ingredients (dried milk, salt, white pepper, potato flakes, green onions) and mix until combined.
4. Stir in the bread flour and yeast.
5. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased pan.
6. Cover and let rise until doubled in size.
7. Bake according to recipe instructions.
8. Turn off the heat when finished baking.
